programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode in the All Stars competition, the chefs are treated to a culinary dream trip to Parma, the legendary home of Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and Prosciutto di Parma ham. After getting a behind the scenes tour of some traditional multi-generational factories of these exclusive products, the chefs must feature these ingredients in two courses and serve their dishes to a table of 16 Michelin stars. Pasta master, Chef Evan Funke, sits in as the guest judge along with Tom, Padma, Gail and a bevy of celebrated Italian super-star chefs. One chef is eliminated as only the top three will move on to the finale.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In an epic Italian showdown, the final three All Stars cook the meal of their lives in an effort to take home the ultimate title and prize. To win, all they’ll need to impress not only the judges - Tom, Padma, Gail and Nilou Motamed, but also culinary superstars Mauro Colagreco, Clare Smyth, Marcus Samuelsson, Janice Wong, Tony Mantuano, Eighth Generation Italian Butcher Dario Cecchini and Food & Wine magazine’s Hunter Lewis. It’s a fight to the bitter end, but only one will have their second chance to finally be crowned Top Chef.

However upon hearing about the dangerous way in which the auditorium was destroyed Eddie's parents become unreasonably overprotective of their son to the point where Eddie must decide between quitting the musical or standing up to his parents.

The data he compiles on the subject he then uses to build a robot he calls BROC (Big Robot on Campus) which he endows with all the sure-fire popularity attributes he can think of thus making it possible for Philly Phil to ride into popularity on BROC's coattails. Surprisingly Philly Phil's plan seems to work... that is until things start backfiring when BROC begins treating Philly Phil as a social liability and starts scoring popularity points at Philly Phil's expense.

programme.desc: The clock ticks as Shawn races to prove the viability of the TOMCOD.

programme.title: High Speed Chase (S2)
programme.desc: Officers track down a stolen military vehicle, face off with a sword-wielding fugitive claiming to be God, and pursue an armed carjacker.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It’s their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S9)
programme.desc: Only days into the winter mining season, a regulator freeze up cuts off Shawn's air supply. Emily negotiates with Mr. Gold for season-saving coordinates.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It’s their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown (S10)

programme.desc: After someone executes a charismatic New Hampshire businessman in his sleep, the case goes ice cold.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral (S1)
programme.desc: Two armed thieves approach a young woman to steal her car, but they get a shock when she fights back.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral (S1)
programme.desc: Thieves snatch a shark from an open tank at an aquarium and make a break for it, with employees hot on their heels.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 11 - GWS Giants v Brisbane Lions
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue - Episode 1
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach.

programme.title: I was actually there - Nicky Winmar's Stand Against Racism
programme.desc: It's a day etched into Australian sporting folklore for all the wrong reasons. A moment on a footy field where Nicky Winmar, a proud Noongar man, called out racism.

programme.title: The Australian Dream
programme.desc: Walkley award-winning writer Stan Grant tells the remarkable story of indigenous AFL legend Adam Goodes. Through the backdrop of Goodes' journey, the film explores race, identity and belonging in Australia today.

programme.title: Island Echoes with Nornie Bero - Episode 8
programme.desc: Join acclaimed Torres Strait Islander chef and cultural ambassador Nornie Bero in Island Echoes, a vibrant journey through the breathtaking landscapes and rich traditions of her homeland.

programme.title: Field to Feast - Episode 4
programme.desc: Thanh "The Fruit Nerd" Truong takes a deep dive into Australian tomatoes, more specifically Roma tomatoes and enjoys a traditional Italian feast, whilst making home-made passata and gnocchi.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 144
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you today's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Meredith Sheehan.

programme.title: Compass - From Ukraine with Love
programme.desc: Ukrainian vet, Maria Mykytiuk, lived an idyllic life until Russia invaded her home of Bucha in 2022. She survived violence and the death of her best friend. Now Maria is safe in Australia, and using her voice to help Ukraine.

programme.title: Off Country - Episode 4
programme.desc: Follow the lives of seven Indigenous students who spend a year boarding at one of the oldest and most elite boarding schools in the country, Geelong Grammar.

programme.title: Stuff the British Stole - Girl And Her Doll
programme.desc: In 2022, a tattered black doll was sent from Britain to the First Nations people of lutruwita/Tasmania, carrying with it a devastating story of a stolen child. Marc Fennell unravels a story of heartbreak and injustice.

programme.title: Dr Ann's Secret Lives - Orangutans
programme.desc: Dr Ann Jones ventures into the heart of Borneo's jungle to look for wild orangutan, following a team of dedicated scientists whose work is leading to new insights into one of the world's most intelligent & elusive great apes.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue - Episode 1
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach.

programme.title: ABC Late News Weekend - Episode 42
programme.desc: When you need to know what's happening turn to ABC News for coverage you can trust. Meredith Sheehan brings you the day's news by reporters in more locations across Australia, connecting communities and telling your stories.

programme.title: Offsiders - Episode 16
programme.desc: Abbey Gelmi and the panel cover the leadup to Rugby League's State of Origin Game 1, plus the countdown to the FIFA World Cup and the latest from the NRL, Super Rugby, Super Netball and more.

programme.title: Island Echoes with Nornie Bero - Episode 8
programme.desc: Join acclaimed Torres Strait Islander chef and cultural ambassador Nornie Bero in Island Echoes, a vibrant journey through the breathtaking landscapes and rich traditions of her homeland.

programme.title: Field to Feast - Episode 4
programme.desc: Thanh "The Fruit Nerd" Truong takes a deep dive into Australian tomatoes, more specifically Roma tomatoes and enjoys a traditional Italian feast, whilst making home-made passata and gnocchi.

programme.title: ABC News Overnight - Episode 42
programme.desc: The final word on the day's top stories, with the latest news and updated information from Australia's most trusted source of independent news. Presented by Meredith Sheehan.

programme.title: Common Cause - Island of Wisdom - Solomon Islands
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by outside forces, the Solomon Island Rangers Association visits the Torres Strait in Australia to learn how traditional knowledge and western science are being harnessed to protect culture and the environment.

programme.title: Compass - From Ukraine with Love
programme.desc: Ukrainian vet, Maria Mykytiuk, lived an idyllic life until Russia invaded her home of Bucha in 2022. She survived violence and the death of her best friend. Now Maria is safe in Australia, and using her voice to help Ukraine.

programme.title: Off Country - Episode 4
programme.desc: Follow the lives of seven Indigenous students who spend a year boarding at one of the oldest and most elite boarding schools in the country, Geelong Grammar.

programme.title: I was actually there - The Beatles' World Record Adelaide Visit
programme.desc: When The Beatles flew into Adelaide, they had no idea that the biggest crowd they would ever witness was waiting for them. Fans describe the life-changing experience of seeing the biggest band in the world arrive.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue - Episode 1
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach.

programme.title: A Brief History of Cricket Down Under: The 80s - Leadership Factor
programme.desc: With a combination of vision and confidence, some extraordinary and brave '80s captains set lofty standards for their team to follow. This episode presents a critique of those who led their countries on Australian soil.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 15
programme.desc: Hosted by award-winning journalist Pip Courtney, Landline is Australia's only national agricultural television program covering stories from Australia's rural and regional heartland.

programme.title: Insiders - Episode 17
programme.desc: 2026 is a defining year for the government and the nation. As tensions rise across the globe, what does it mean for our security? David Speers and the panel cut though the spin and reveal the power plays behind the politics.

programme.title: Offsiders - Episode 16
programme.desc: Abbey Gelmi and the panel cover the leadup to Rugby League's State of Origin Game 1, plus the countdown to the FIFA World Cup and the latest from the NRL, Super Rugby, Super Netball and more.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 103
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 103
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings - Episode 103
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News at Noon - Episode 103
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Kathryn Robinson brings you today's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter.

programme.title: The Matter of Facts - Disinformation versus Democracy
programme.desc: Disinformation campaigns prove shockingly innovative in this investigation of digital deception on the international stage - from Paris to the Philippines. We see how, when truth is under attack, democracy is weakened.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A police detective, a bank robber and a high-power broker enter high-stakes negotiations after the criminal's brilliant heist spirals into a hostage situation.

programme.title: Cat People
programme.desc: Nastassja Kinski stars in this erotic fantasy about a beautiful young woman who discovers love for the first time, only to find that the explosive experience brings tragic consequences.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In a time of darkness and in the face of evil, one man dared to fight back. Utilising his combat skills as an assassin, a warrior defies an empire to become a legend and unite a nation.

programme.title: Training Day
programme.desc: A rookie cop spends his first day as a Los Angeles narcotics officer with a rogue detective who isn't what he appears to be.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A bounty hunter learns that his next target is his ex-wife.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: A beautiful CIA officer accused of being a Russian spy must go on the run to clear her name and identify a would-be presidential assassin.

programme.title: V for Vendetta
programme.desc: In a future Britain turned fascist, a masked vigilante known as “V” fights to free the nation. Teaming up with a young woman he rescues, they ignite a revolution against tyranny.

programme.desc: Julia Roberts and Hugh Grant star in this delightful romantic comedy about a world-famous movie star who falls in love with a bookstore owner while the whole world watches.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang kahalagahan ng mabuting paglilingkod ng mga namumuno sa pagsulong ng mga pangunahing hanapbuhay at pagtugon sa pangangailangan ng mga kasapi ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang tambalang salita, pandiwa, pang-abay, at pang-ukol. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng sariling ideya, hinuha, pangunahin at sumusuportang kaisipan, tungkol sa kuwentong napakinggan.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang pagkakakilanlang kultural ng kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science

programme.title: Grade 4 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano wastong gamitin ang mga pang-abay, pang-uri, pang-angkop, pangatnig, salitang naglalarawan. Aralin kung paano magsulat ng pangungusap, talata, at balita, at kung paano magsuri ng mga kuwento at mga pahayag.

programme.title: Grade 4 Math
programme.desc: Learn about parallel and perpendicular lines, angles, triangles, quadrilaterals, continuous and repeating patterns and number sentences, and the concept of time, perimeter, area, and volume.

programme.title: Grade 4 English
programme.desc: Learn what are adverbs, signal words, and graphic organizers, and how to analyze a story and infer the speaker's tone, mood and purpose.

programme.desc: Unawain ang bahaging ginagampanan ng pamahalaan sa lipunan, mga pinuno at iba pang naglilingkod sa pagkakaisa, kaayusan at kaunlaran ng bansa.

programme.title: Grade 4 Science
programme.desc: Know more about forces that change the shape, size or movement of objects and how light, heat and sound travel using various media.

programme.title: Grade 9 Math

programme.title: Grade 9 English

Vacuum food jars and flasks keep meals and drinks hot or cold for 6 hours—lightweight, leak-proof, and easy to carry, perfect for meal prep or on-the-go. The compact multi-function rice cooker features an ultra-thick inner pot and versatile menus like Eco, Quick Cook, Porridge, Brown Rice, and Cake, keeping rice warm up to 12 hours with evenly cooked, fluffy results—ideal for small families. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Mirtogenol Plus+
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ is a clinically tested eye health formula developed by ophthalmologists and scientists from the UK and Italy. Powered by two powerful antioxidants—Pycnogenol® and Mirtoselect®—with Citrus Bioflavonoids, it supports healthy eye pressure, improves microcirculation, and helps protect against daily screen-related eye stress. It helps reduce eye fatigue, dryness, and blurred vision for clearer, more comfortable vision. Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ 为眼科医生及英意科研团队研发的临床护眼配方，结合两大强效抗氧化成分 Pycnogenol® 法国松树皮与 Mirtoselect® 欧洲蓝莓，并添加柑橘类黄酮，有助改善眼部微循环、支持健康眼压、对抗用眼压力与氧化损伤，缓解眼睛干涩、疲劳与模糊感，让视力更清晰、更舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO ePhysio

With dual channels for body pads and waist belt, it allows full-body use—helping reduce fatigue, improve circulation, and support overall wellness. programme.title: Films & Stars - EP 7

programme.title: The Cube S11 - EP 5

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8 - EP 6

programme.title: Animal Impossible - EP 6
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Lingo UK S2 - EP 17

Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 8 前线追踪
programme.desc: Recently, the weather has become increasingly humid and stuffy. What is urban heat island effect? Why do heat-related illnesses such as heatstroke and heat exhaustion affect vulnerable groups like the elderly more severely during periods of extreme heat?
